ds212.description: Regulations for paid passenger transport services. All our drivers and vehicles comply with the established technical and safety requirements.

verifiedDrivers.title: 100% Verified Drivers
verifiedDrivers.subtitle: Every driver undergoes a rigorous validation process before being allowed to operate

requirement1.title: Class A1 Professional License
requirement1.description: Valid professional driver's license as required by Traffic Law. We verify authenticity with the Civil Registry.

requirement2.title: Clean Background
requirement2.description: No criminal records. Verification in the Registry of Disqualifications for working with minors.

requirement3.title: National Service Registry
requirement3.description: Mandatory enrollment in the RNSTP (National Registry of Remunerated Passenger Transport Services).

requirement4.title: Mandatory Training
requirement4.description: All drivers complete training on platform usage, customer service and safety protocols.

authorizedVehicles.title: 100% Authorized Vehicles
authorizedVehicles.subtitle: Only taxis that comply with all current regulations

requirement1.title: Municipal Registration
requirement1.description: Valid registration in the municipal Taxi Registry as required by Supreme Decree 212/92.

requirement2.title: Technical Inspection
requirement2.description: Up-to-date technical and emissions inspection. Verification every 6 months as required by the Ministry of Transport.

requirement3.title: Certified Taximeter
requirement3.description: Taximeter certified and sealed by the SII (Internal Revenue Service). Official fare programmed.

requirement4.title: Valid Insurance
requirement4.description: SOAP (Mandatory Personal Accident Insurance) and civil liability insurance up to date.

liveTracking.title: Real-Time Traceability and Tracking
liveTracking.subtitle: Complete tracking of your trip from start to finish

feature2.title: Share Your Trip

feature3.title: Route Recording
feature3.description: Every meter traveled is documented. Complete route saved for auditing, claims or future inquiries.

feature4.title: Automatic Notifications
feature4.description: Alerts when the taxi is arriving, when the trip starts and when you reach your destination. Peace of mind for you and your family.

info3.title: Rating and Reviews
info3.description: Average rating from other passengers. Real comments from previous trips.

info4.title: Vehicle Details
info4.description: Make, model, color and license plate of the taxi. Confirm it's the correct vehicle before getting in.

info5.title: Number of Trips
info5.description: History of completed trips on the platform. Verifiable experience.

info6.title: Certifications
info6.description: Badges for outstanding driver, punctuality, vehicle cleanliness and more.

ios.title: iOS
ios.devices: Compatible with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch

q1.question: Is it available for iOS and Android?
q1.answer: Yes, ETAXI is available on both App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android). Download it for free on your preferred device.

q2.question: Is the app free to download?
q2.answer: Yes, the download is 100% free and there is no subscription cost. You only pay for the trips you take according to the official fare.

q3.question: What permissions does the app need?
q3.answer: The app needs access to your location to show nearby taxis and calculate routes. Optionally, you can allow notifications to receive updates about your trip. All permissions are configurable.

q4.question: Can I use ETAXI without registering?
q4.answer: To request a taxi you need to create an account. Registration is quick and only requires your phone number. We use OTP (SMS code) for better security, no passwords needed.

q5.question: How does payment work?
q5.answer: Payment is made directly to the driver at the end of the trip. You can pay in cash or with the methods the driver accepts. The fare is official and transparent.

q6.question: Can I cancel a trip?
q6.answer: Yes, you can cancel your request before the driver arrives. Check the cancellation policy in the app for more details.

intro.description: Find quick answers to frequently asked questions or file a complaint if needed.

q1.question: How do I request a taxi?
q1.answer: Download the ETAXI app, create your account, enter your origin and destination, and confirm. A regulated taxi will arrive in minutes.

q2.question: Can I cancel a trip?
q2.answer: Yes, you can cancel before the taxi arrives. Check the cancellation policy in the app.

q3.question: How can I rate the driver?
q3.answer: At the end of the trip, the app will ask you to rate your experience and the driver.

q4.question: What do I do if I forgot something in the taxi?
q4.answer: Contact immediately through the app. We have a record of the driver and can help you recover your belongings.

q1.question: Is ETAXI available in my city?
q1.answer: ETAXI is available in Chile's main cities and we keep expanding. Download the app to see if there's coverage in your area. If not, we'll be there soon.

q2.question: How much does using ETAXI cost?
q2.answer: Downloading and registering is 100% free. You only pay the official trip fare, with no subscription cost or hidden charges. The fare is fixed and transparent.

q3.question: How is the fare calculated?
q3.answer: We use the official fare regulated by the Ministry of Transport. It's a fixed rate that doesn't change based on demand, peak hours or weather. Always transparent.

q4.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q4.answer: Currently payment is made directly to the driver at the end of the trip (cash or methods the driver accepts). We're working on integrating digital payments in the app.

q5.question: Can I request a taxi for someone else?
q5.answer: Yes, you can request a taxi for a family member or friend by entering the corresponding pickup address. Ideal for helping elderly people or sending taxis to others.

q6.question: What if I have a problem during the trip?
q6.answer: You have several options: use the panic button for emergencies, contact 24/7 support from the app, or report the problem after the trip. All complaints are investigated.

q7.question: Can I cancel a requested trip?
q7.answer: Yes, you can cancel before the driver arrives. The app will show you the cancellation conditions. We ask you to do so only when necessary to not affect drivers.

q8.question: How do I know the driver is trustworthy?
q8.answer: All our drivers undergo background checks, have a valid professional A1 license and are legally registered. Additionally, each driver has a visible rating.

hero.title: How ETAXI Works
hero.subtitle: The platform that connects passengers, drivers and businesses under a 100% legal and transparent model

passengerFlow.title: For Passengers
passengerFlow.subtitle: Requesting a legal taxi has never been easier

step1.title: Download the App
step1.description: Install ETAXI free from App Store or Google Play. Register with your phone number using OTP code. No complicated passwords.

step2.title: Request your Taxi
step2.description: Open the app, allow your location and select your destination. The app shows you nearby legal taxis with estimated arrival time.

step3.title: Confirm Details
step3.description: Review estimated fare (official, no surge pricing), driver details and vehicle license plate. Confirm your request.

step4.title: Track Your Taxi in Real-Time
step4.description: See where your taxi is on the map. Share your trip with trusted contacts. Receive notifications when it's arriving.

step5.title: Travel Safely
step5.description: During the trip you have access to panic button, complete traceability and 24/7 support. Everything is recorded for your safety.

step6.title: Pay and Rate
step6.description: When finished, pay directly to the driver (cash or digital methods). Rate your experience to help improve the service.

driverFlow.title: For Drivers
driverFlow.subtitle: Work legally and access more passengers with modern technology

step1.title: Register on ETAXI
step1.description: Complete the registration form with your personal and vehicle data. You need A1 license, municipal permits and taxi documents.

step2.title: Document Validation
step2.description: Our team verifies your professional license, permits, background and that your vehicle meets all legal requirements. Response in 24-48 hrs.

step3.title: Training
step3.description: We teach you how to use the driver app: how to accept trips, navigate, mark states and use all features. Dedicated support available.

step4.title: Activate Your Availability
step4.description: Download the driver app, log in and activate your availability when you're ready to work. You control when and where you work.

step5.title: Receive Requests
step5.description: The platform assigns you trips based on your location and availability. You see origin address, destination and estimated fare before accepting.

step6.title: Complete the Trip
step6.description: Pick up passenger, make the trip following GPS route, collect payment when finished and receive your rating. Access to history and statistics.

businessFlow.title: For Businesses and Guilds
businessFlow.subtitle: Digitize your operation maintaining control and legal compliance

step1.title: Initial Contact
step1.description: Complete the business contact form. Our sales team contacts you to understand your specific needs.

step2.title: Analysis and Proposal
step2.description: We analyze your current operation: number of vehicles, organizational structure, reporting and billing needs. We design a customized solution.

step3.title: Implementation
step3.description: We configure the platform according to your requirements: users, permissions, cost centers, mobility policies. We train your operations team.

step4.title: Fleet Registration
step4.description: We register your drivers and vehicles verifying they comply with all regulations. Centralized management of your authorized fleet.

step5.title: Operation and Monitoring
step5.description: You start operating with complete traceability. Real-time control panel, trip assignment, fleet tracking and automatic reports.

step6.title: Reports and Optimization
step6.description: Access to consolidated reports, trip auditing, expense control and performance metrics. Continuous improvement of your operation.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using the website www.etaxi.cl (hereinafter, the 'Site') and the ETAXI mobile applications (hereinafter, the 'Apps'), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions of Use, all applicable laws and regulations in Chile, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with all applicable local laws. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you must not use this Site or the Apps.

section2.title: 2. Description of the Service
section2.subtitle: ETAXI is a technology intermediation platform
section2.content: ETAXI SpA (hereinafter, 'ETAXI') is a technology platform that connects users (passengers) with legally authorized taxi drivers and their vehicles duly registered with competent authorities. ETAXI is NOT a transport operator, is NOT the owner of the vehicles, and is NOT the employer of the drivers. The transport service itself is provided by independent professional drivers or those affiliated with guilds, cooperatives or authorized taxi centrals.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities:
responsibilities.etaxi: ETAXI provides the technology, the digital platform, GPS trip traceability, the service assignment system and technical support.
responsibilities.operators: Taxi operators, guilds, cooperatives or individual drivers are responsible for the transport service, vehicle conditions, compliance with traffic and transport regulations, and passenger care during the trip.

web.title: 3.1 Website (www.etaxi.cl)
web.content: The Site serves informational and commercial purposes. It allows companies, guilds and users to learn about ETAXI services, request information, contact the sales team and access educational resources about the platform.

apps.title: 3.2 Mobile Applications
apps.passenger: Passenger App: Allows users to request taxi services, see the assigned vehicle's location, pay for the service and rate the experience.
apps.driver: Driver App: Allows authorized drivers to receive service requests, navigate to the passenger, mark trip states and manage their availability.

section4.title: 4. Registration and User Account
section4.content: To use the Apps, users must register by providing truthful, accurate and current information. Drivers must also meet specific legal requirements (Class A1 License, municipal permits, authorized vehicle, etc.) that will be validated by ETAXI before activation on the platform.
section4.obligations: The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account and password, and for all activities that occur under their account.

section5.title: 5. Acceptable Use
section5.intro: By using ETAXI, the user agrees to:
section5.rule1: Provide truthful information and not impersonate identities.
section5.rule2: Not use the platform for illegal, fraudulent or unauthorized purposes.
section5.rule3: Not attempt to breach platform security, reverse engineer the Apps or access restricted areas.
section5.rule4: Respect drivers, passengers and support staff. Offensive, discriminatory or violent behavior may result in account suspension or deletion.
section5.rule5: Comply with applicable traffic and transport laws in Chile.

section6.title: 6. Limitations of Liability
section6.intro: ETAXI acts as a technology intermediary. Therefore:
section6.limit1: ETAXI is not liable for damages, losses, delays, accidents or harm that occur during the transport service provided by third parties (drivers, guilds, cooperatives).
section6.limit2: ETAXI does not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the platform, Apps or connectivity service. There may be interruptions due to maintenance, technical failures or force majeure.
section6.limit3: ETAXI is not responsible for the loss of personal belongings inside vehicles. The user should contact the driver or corresponding guild directly.
section6.limit4: ETAXI is not liable for the quality of the transport service provided by third parties, although it facilitates reporting, rating and continuous improvement mechanisms.

section7.title: 7. Rates and Payments
section7.content: Taxi service rates are determined by current regulations (regulated official rates) or by agreements between the user and the operator/guild in cases permitted by law. ETAXI may facilitate digital payment processing through third-party payment gateways. The user agrees to pay the corresponding amounts for services used.

section8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
section8.content: All content on the Site and Apps (texts, graphics, logos, icons, images, source code, design) is the property of ETAXI SpA or its licensors and is protected by Chilean intellectual property laws and international treaties. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution or modification is prohibited.

section9.title: 9. Modification of Terms
section9.content: ETAXI reserves the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the Site. It is the user's responsibility to periodically review these terms. Continued use of the Site or Apps after publication of changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

section10.title: 10. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
section10.content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the Republic of Chile. Any dispute arising from the use of the Site or Apps shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the ordinary courts of justice in Santiago de Chile, with the parties expressly waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them.

section11.title: 11. Contact
section11.content: For inquiries about these Terms and Conditions, you may contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ETAXI SpA ('ETAXI', 'we', 'our') we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, share and protect your personal information when you use our website www.etaxi.cl and our mobile applications.

web.title: 1.1 Through the Website
web.item1: Contact data: Name, email, phone, company (when completing contact forms or requesting information).
web.item2: Browsing data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent (through cookies and similar technologies).
web.item3: Commercial lead data: Information provided in B2B forms for companies and guilds interested in our solutions.

passenger.title: Passenger App:
passenger.item1: Registration data: Name, phone, email (optional), profile photo (optional).
passenger.item2: Location data: Real-time GPS location to request and track the trip.
passenger.item3: Trip data: Origin, destination, route followed, duration, fare, assigned driver.
passenger.item4: Payment data: Selected payment method (cash or digital). If using digital payment, card data is processed by third-party payment gateways and is not stored directly by ETAXI.
passenger.item5: Device data: Model, operating system, unique identifiers (for push notifications and technical support).

driver.title: Driver App:
driver.item1: Personal data: Full name, RUT (Chilean tax ID), phone, email, photograph.
driver.item2: Professional data: Class A1 driver's license, municipal permits, background certificates.
driver.item3: Vehicle data: License plate, make, model, year, color, authorization documents.
driver.item4: Location data: Real-time GPS location when available to receive services.
driver.item5: Trip data: History of completed trips, ratings received, earnings generated.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.intro: We use the collected information for:
section2.purpose1: Service operation: Connecting passengers with drivers, assigning trips, calculating routes and fares, processing payments.
section2.purpose2: Security and fraud prevention: Verifying driver identity, detecting suspicious behavior, ensuring regulatory compliance.
section2.purpose3: Customer support: Responding to inquiries, resolving complaints, providing technical assistance.
section2.purpose4: Service improvement: Analyzing usage patterns, aggregated statistics, optimizing assignment algorithms.
section2.purpose5: Communications: Sending service-related notifications, platform updates, commercial information (with your consent).
section2.purpose6: Legal compliance: Responding to requests from competent authorities when legally required.

section3.title: 3. Who We Share Your Information With
section3.intro: ETAXI may share your personal information with:

party1.title: Drivers and operators:
party1.content: Passengers share their name, origin/destination location and phone number with the assigned driver to facilitate the service. Drivers share their name, photo, vehicle and location with passengers.

party2.title: Guilds, cooperatives and taxi centrals:
party2.content: If the driver belongs to an associated guild, they may access driver data and trip statistics for operational management.

party3.title: Corporate clients (B2B):
party3.content: If you are an employee of a company that contracts ETAXI services, your company may access corporate trip information assigned to your account.

party4.title: Technology service providers:
party4.content: Cloud servers (AWS, Google Cloud), mapping services (Google Maps), payment gateways, analytics tools (Google Analytics), email sending and push notification services.

party5.title: Authorities and legal compliance:
party5.content: We may disclose information if required by law, court order, transport authority inspection or to protect the rights, safety and property of ETAXI and its users.

section3.noSale: ETAXI does NOT sell or commercialize your personal information to third parties for advertising purposes.

section4.title: 4. Your Rights (ARCO Rights)
section4.intro: In accordance with Chilean personal data protection legislation, you have the right to:
section4.right1: Access: Request information about what personal data we hold about you.
section4.right2: Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
section4.right3: Cancellation: Request the deletion of your personal data when it is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.
section4.right4: Opposition: Object to the processing of your personal data in certain cases.
section4.exercise: To exercise these rights, you can send us an email at contacto@etaxichile.cl with your request. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe.

section5.title: 5. Information Security
section5.content: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, alteration or disclosure. We use SSL/TLS encryption for data transmissions, secure authentication, access controls and security monitoring. However, no system is 100% secure. We also recommend you take precautions with your password and devices.

section6.title: 6. Data Retention
section6.content: We retain your personal information while your account is active or necessary to provide the service. Trip and transaction data may be retained for longer periods for legal, accounting and audit compliance (generally 5-7 years under Chilean regulations). Anonymized data may be retained indefinitely for statistical purposes.

section7.title: 7. Cookies and Similar Technologies
section7.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, remember preferences, analyze web traffic and show relevant content. For more information, see our Cookie Policy.

section8.title: 8. International Transfers
section8.content: Some of our technology service providers may be located outside Chile (e.g., cloud servers). In these cases, we ensure adequate protection measures exist through data processing contracts and standard transfer clauses.

section9.title: 9. Minors
section9.content: ETAXI is not directed at minors under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect personal information from minors without consent from their parents or guardians. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor without authorization, we will proceed to delete it.

section10.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
section10.content: We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. The updated version will be published on our Site with the 'Last updated' date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.

section11.title: 11. Contact
section11.content: For privacy and data protection inquiries, contact us at:

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them on the website www.etaxi.cl, what types of cookies we use and how you can manage or disable them.

section1.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
section1.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website. Cookies allow the website to recognize your device and remember information about your visit, such as your language preferences, settings and browsing activity.

section2.title: 2. What Do We Use Cookies For?
section2.purpose1: Site functionality: Remember your preferences (selected language, display settings).
section2.purpose2: Security: Detect and prevent fraudulent activities, protect your account.
section2.purpose3: Analysis and statistics: Understand how users interact with our site, what pages they visit, how long they stay. This helps us improve the user experience.
section2.purpose4: Performance: Measure site performance, identify technical issues and optimize loading speed.

essential.title: 3.1 Essential Cookies (Strictly Necessary)
essential.content: These cookies are essential for the website to function. They allow you to navigate the site and use basic features such as access to secure areas. Without these cookies, the site cannot function properly.
essential.examples: Examples: Session cookies, authentication cookies, security cookies.

analytics.title: 3.2 Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: These cookies collect information about how visitors use the website (pages visited, time spent, links clicked). The information is aggregated and anonymous. We use these cookies to analyze web traffic and improve our site.
analytics.examples: Examples: Google Analytics (if implemented), behavioral analysis cookies.

functional.title: 3.3 Functional Cookies
functional.content: These cookies allow the site to remember the choices you make (such as language, region or display preferences) and provide enhanced and more personalized features.
functional.examples: Examples: Language preference cookies, approximate location cookies.

marketing.title: 3.4 Marketing and Advertising Cookies (if applicable)
marketing.content: These cookies are used to show ads relevant to the user and to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns. Currently, ETAXI does NOT use third-party marketing or advertising cookies. This section is included for future transparency.
marketing.note: Note: If we implement advertising or remarketing in the future, we will update this policy and request your explicit consent where required by law.

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
section4.content: Some of our service providers (such as Google Analytics, Google Maps, payment gateways) may set cookies on your device when you visit our site. These third-party cookies are subject to those third parties' privacy policies. We recommend reviewing those policies.
section4.examples: Examples: Google Analytics, Google Maps, cloud service providers.

section5.title: 5. How to Manage and Disable Cookies
section5.intro: You can control and manage cookies in several ways:

browser.title: 5.1 Browser Settings
browser.content: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can configure your browser to reject cookies or to notify you when cookies are sent. However, if you disable cookies, some site features may not work properly.
browser.chrome: Google Chrome: Settings > Privacy and Security > Cookies
browser.firefox: Mozilla Firefox: Options > Privacy and Security > Cookies
browser.edge: Microsoft Edge: Settings > Privacy, Search and Services > Cookies

optOut.title: 5.2 Disable Analytics Cookies
optOut.content: If you wish to disable Google Analytics specifically, you can install the Google Analytics opt-out add-on available at: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout

consequences.title: 5.3 Consequences of Disabling Cookies
consequences.content: If you disable all cookies, you may not be able to use some website features, such as remembering your language preferences, keeping your session active or accessing personalized areas.

section6.title: 6. Cookie Duration
section6.session: Session cookies: Automatically deleted when you close your browser.
section6.persistent: Persistent cookies: Remain on your device for a specific period of time (days, months or years) or until you manually delete them.
section6.duration: The duration of our cookies varies depending on their purpose. Essential cookies are typically session-based, while analytics and functional cookies may be persistent (typically 6 months to 2 years).

section7.title: 7. Updates to This Policy
section7.content: We may update this Cookie Policy occasionally to reflect changes in our practices or applicable legislation. The updated version will be published on our site with the 'Last updated' date.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.content: If you have questions about our Cookie Policy, you can contact us at:

hero.title: Regulatory Compliance for Companies and Unions
hero.subtitle: Operate with order and traceability under Law 21.553 and Decree 212
hero.description: ETAXI is a technology platform designed to help companies and unions manage regulated taxis with full traceability, reducing regulatory risk and facilitating compliance.

regulations.title: Regulatory Framework in Which ETAXI Operates
regulations.subtitle: ETAXI aligns with Chile's transportation regulatory framework to help companies and unions operate within the law.

law21553.title: Law 21.553 — Transportation Application Companies (EAT)
law21553.description: This law establishes the legal framework for technology platforms that intermediate remunerated passenger transportation services.
law21553.bullet1: Requires platforms to work only with vehicles duly authorized by the Ministry of Transport
law21553.bullet2: Establishes obligations for traceability, trip records, and fare transparency
law21553.bullet3: Protects both passengers and drivers with safety standards and mandatory insurance

ds212.title: Supreme Decree 212 — Taxis and Regulated Services
ds212.description: Regulation governing the operation of collective taxis, radio taxis, and remunerated passenger transport services.
ds212.bullet1: Defines vehicle licensing requirements (municipal permits, technical inspection, insurance)
ds212.bullet2: Establishes that only authorized drivers can operate regulated taxis
ds212.bullet3: Requires fares approved by competent authority and operational activity records

role.title: ETAXI's Role within this Framework
role.subtitle: ETAXI is a technology provider, not a transport operator. We clarify what we do and what we don't do.

does.title: ETAXI Does:
does.item1: Provides the technology platform for trip assignment and fleet management
does.item2: Facilitates complete trip traceability (origin, destination, driver, time)
does.item3: Enables operational control and report generation for companies and unions
does.item4: Offers tools to validate that only authorized drivers and vehicles operate

doesnt.title: ETAXI Doesn't:
doesnt.item1: Doesn't operate transport or employ drivers
doesnt.item2: Doesn't contract or pay drivers directly (that's the operator's responsibility)
doesnt.item3: Doesn't set fares as operator (fares are configured by the authorized operator)
doesnt.item4: Doesn't issue invoices for trips (that's done by the transport operator)

risks.title: Risks of Operating with Unregulated Apps
risks.subtitle: Using platforms that don't align with Chilean regulations can expose companies and unions to legal, operational, and reputational problems.
risks.risk1: Risk of fines for using transport services not compliant with regulations (Law 21.553 and DS 212)
risks.risk2: Difficulty backing insurance claims in case of accident if service isn't properly authorized
risks.risk3: Disorder in labor responsibilities: confusion about who is the employer and who manages the relationship with drivers
risks.risk4: Corporate reputation impact: operating with informal services can affect image before stakeholders, clients, and authorities

counterpoint.title: ETAXI is designed to provide order, traceability, and documentary support
counterpoint.description: By working exclusively with regulated taxis and aligning with Chilean regulations, ETAXI helps companies and unions reduce legal risk, have greater operational control, and maintain auditable traceability of all trips.

benefits.title: Concrete Benefits of ETAXI for Compliance
benefits.subtitle: ETAXI provides tools oriented to compliance, internal audit, and risk control.

benefit1.title: Complete Trip and Driver Registry
benefit1.description: Every trip is recorded with date, time, origin, destination, driver, and vehicle, facilitating internal and external audits.

benefit2.title: Management Control Reports
benefit2.description: Download trip reports by cost center, driver, or period, useful for accounting reconciliation and expense review.

benefit3.title: Regulated Taxi Only / Authorized Driver Only Policies
benefit3.description: Define rules in the platform to ensure only authorized vehicles and drivers can operate, reducing compliance risk.

benefit4.title: Documentary Support for Insurance and Compliance
benefit4.description: In case of audit, claim, or compliance review, ETAXI provides supporting documentation about who, when, and where each trip was made.

disclaimer.title: Legal Notice
disclaimer.text1: The information contained on this page is general and for reference only. It does not constitute legal advice nor replaces the opinion of a lawyer or legal advisor.
disclaimer.text2: Each company, union, or transport operator is responsible for reviewing their particular situation with their legal area and ensuring compliance with all applicable current regulations.
disclaimer.text3: ETAXI provides technological tools to support regulatory compliance, but the ultimate responsibility for operating according to law rests with the transport operator using the platform.

finalCta.title: Let's Talk About How to Organize Your Transport Operation
finalCta.description: ETAXI helps organize, document, and provide traceability to regulated taxi management for companies and unions. Schedule a meeting with our team.

enterprise.title: Solutions for Enterprises
enterprise.subtitle: Manage corporate transportation with full control, safety and regulatory compliance

benefit1.title: Regulated Corporate Transport
benefit1.description: Ensure all your company's transfers are made in 100% legal and authorized taxis. Comply with internal mobility policies and reduce legal risks.

benefit2.title: Centralized Billing
benefit2.description: Receive a single consolidated monthly invoice with details of all trips. Simplify accounting and reduce administrative time.

benefit3.title: Customized Cost Centers
benefit3.description: Assign each trip to specific projects, departments or cost centers. Full expense control by area of your organization.

benefit4.title: Advanced Reports and Analytics
benefit4.description: Dashboard with real-time metrics: trips per user, expenses per cost center, peak hours, frequent routes and more. Make informed decisions.

benefit5.title: Corporate Rate Control
benefit5.description: Fixed official rates without dynamic pricing. Budget with certainty and avoid surprises in mobility expenses.

benefit6.title: Priority Service and Dedicated Support
benefit6.description: Preferential attention for your employees. Exclusive account manager and dedicated technical support for your company.

benefit7.title: ERP and Systems Integration
benefit7.description: API to integrate ETAXI with your enterprise management system. Automate approvals, validations and data synchronization.

benefit8.title: SLA and Service Guarantees
benefit8.description: Service level agreements with guaranteed response times. 24/7 availability for your critical operations.

guild.title: Solutions for Guilds and Taxi Centrals
guild.subtitle: Modernize your fleet management while maintaining control and autonomy of your organization
guild.intro: ETAXI digitizes the operation of guilds and taxi centrals without altering their traditional structure. Maintain control of your organization while accessing world-class technology.

benefit1.title: Complete Fleet Management
benefit1.description: Control panel to manage drivers, vehicles, shifts and availability. Centralized registry of your authorized fleet with real-time status.

benefit2.title: Automatic Trip Assignment
benefit2.description: Algorithm that distributes services among your drivers based on availability, location and shifts. Optimizes operations and maximizes earnings for everyone.

benefit3.title: Real-Time Operator Panel
benefit3.description: Monitor your entire fleet on a live map. See which drivers are available, on a trip or off-duty. Full operational control.

benefit4.title: GPS Traceability for Every Trip
benefit4.description: Complete record of each service: driver, passenger, route, times and fare. Ideal for municipal audits and permit renewals.

benefit5.title: Guild Statistics and Reports
benefit5.description: Consolidated reports of trips, revenue, driver performance and trends. Make informed decisions for your guild.

benefit6.title: Configurable Roles and Permissions
benefit6.description: Define permissions for board members, operators, supervisors and drivers. Each role with specific access based on your organizational structure.

benefit7.title: Guild Rate Control
benefit7.description: Configure rates according to municipal regulations or guild agreements. Total transparency with no hidden charges or abusive commissions.

benefit8.title: Full Guild Autonomy
benefit8.description: The guild maintains control over its members, internal policies and management. ETAXI only provides the technology without interfering in your organization.

caseStudies.title: Success Stories
caseStudies.subtitle: Companies and guilds that already trust ETAXI

case1.challenge: Managing worker transfers during night shifts with full traceability for safety audits.
case1.solution: ETAXI implementation with corporate panel, trip assignment by shift and automatic compliance reports.
case1.results: 30% reduction in transport costs. 100% traceability for audits. 95% worker satisfaction.

case2.challenge: Competing with unregulated apps without losing guild identity. Needed modern technology while respecting traditional structure.
case2.solution: Complete digitization with operator panel, automatic assignment and guild statistics. Training for all members.
case2.results: +40% monthly trips. Full operational control. 95% active member retention.

case3.challenge: Replace taxi reimbursements with a centralized system with expense control and cost centers.
case3.solution: ETAXI integration with corporate ERP. Assignment by cost center and project. Consolidated monthly billing.
case3.results: 50% reduction in administrative time. 25% savings in mobility costs. Full expense visibility.

comparison.title: ETAXI vs Other Systems
comparison.subtitle: Compare our B2B solution with market alternatives

feature1.title: Legal Compliance
feature1.etaxi: 100% legal. Only authorized taxis with Law 21.553 and DS 212
feature1.apps: Unregulated vehicles. Risk of fines and inspections
feature1.traditional: Legal but without traceability or digital control

feature2.title: Trip Traceability
feature2.etaxi: Real-time GPS. Complete record of each trip for audits
feature2.traditional: No digital record. Only paper vouchers

feature3.title: Corporate Reports
feature3.etaxi: Advanced dashboard. Reports by cost center, user and project
feature3.apps: Basic reports. No integration with enterprise systems
feature3.traditional: Manual Excel reports. High administrative effort

feature4.title: Rates and Costs
feature4.etaxi: Fixed official rate. No dynamic pricing. Budgetable
feature4.apps: Unpredictable dynamic rates. Surcharges during peak hours
feature4.traditional: Official rate but no expense control

feature5.title: Enterprise Integration
feature5.etaxi: API for ERP. Automatic data and cost center synchronization

feature6.title: Billing
feature6.etaxi: Consolidated monthly invoice. One document for accounting
feature6.apps: Invoice per trip or receipts. High accounting effort
feature6.traditional: Scattered invoices from multiple dispatchers. Hard to consolidate

enterpriseProcess.title: Implementation Process for Enterprises
enterpriseProcess.subtitle: From the first meeting to full operation in 5 steps

step1.title: Initial Meeting and Demo
step1.description: Schedule a meeting with our sales team. We'll show you the platform in action, understand your needs and answer all your questions.

step2.title: Requirements Analysis
step2.description: We analyze your current operation: users, frequent routes, cost centers, mobility policies and integration requirements. We design a custom solution.

step3.title: Commercial Proposal and Contract
step3.description: We present a detailed technical and commercial proposal. We agree on rates, SLA, service conditions and sign the framework contract.

step4.title: Setup and Training
step4.description: We configure your corporate account: users, cost centers, permissions, policies. We train your administrative team and end users.

step5.title: Operation and Continuous Support
step5.description: Your company starts operating with ETAXI. Dedicated account manager, 24/7 technical support, monthly reports and follow-up meetings.

guildProcess.title: Implementation Process for Guilds
guildProcess.subtitle: Digitize your operation while maintaining guild control and autonomy

step1.title: Contact and Presentation
step1.description: Meeting with the guild board. We explain how ETAXI works, respect your traditional structure and show success stories from other guilds.

step2.title: Guild Operation Analysis
step2.description: We evaluate number of members, organizational structure, current assignment system, rates and specific guild needs.

step3.title: Guild Agreement and Conditions
step3.description: We negotiate commercial conditions with the board. We define commissions, assignment policies, rate control and guild autonomy.

step4.title: Driver and Fleet Registration
step4.description: We validate documentation for each member (A1 license, permits, vehicle). We register drivers and taxis on the platform with all updated data.

step5.title: Training for Members and Operators
step5.description: We train guild operators on the control panel and drivers on the app. In-person support during the first weeks of operation.

step6.title: Digital Guild Operation
step6.description: The guild operates with modern technology while maintaining its autonomy. Operator panel to assign trips, guild statistics and continuous support.

requirements.title: Requirements According to Chilean Regulations
requirements.subtitle: To drive with ETAXI you must comply with current Ministry of Transport legislation

req1.title: Professional License A1, A2 or A3
req1.description: Valid professional driver's license as required by Traffic Law (Law 18.290)

req2.title: Minimum Age 20 Years
req2.description: You must be at least 20 years old to operate as a taxi driver

req3.title: Professional Driving School Course
req3.description: Approved course from an authorized professional driving school

req5.title: Regional Residence
req5.description: You must reside in the region where you will operate as a driver

req1.title: Minimum Engine Size 1.4 Liters
req1.description: Engine with minimum displacement of 1,400 cc (updated 2024)

req2.title: Maximum Age 3 Years
req2.description: The vehicle must not exceed 3 years of age at the time of initial registration

req3.title: 4-Door Body
req3.description: Vehicle with 4-door body (basic and tourism taxis)

req4.title: Regulatory Paint
req4.description: Basic taxi: yellow roof and black body. Executive taxi: no special paint required

req5.title: Valid Technical Inspection
req5.description: Up-to-date Technical Inspection Certificate as required by the Ministry of Transport

req6.title: Vehicle Records Certificate
req6.description: Current Vehicle Records Certificate from the Motor Vehicle Registry

req1.title: RNSTP Registration
req1.description: Ministry of Transport authorization registered in the National Registry of Passenger Transport Services (RNSTP)

req2.title: Taxi SOAP Insurance
req2.description: Mandatory Personal Accident Insurance (SOAP) for taxis, renewed annually

req3.title: Circulation Permit
req3.description: Valid circulation permit issued by the corresponding municipality

req4.title: Supplementary Insurance
req4.description: Supplementary insurance for remunerated passenger transport

optional.title: According to Work Mode
optional.req1: Membership in a guild, cooperative or transport company (if applicable)
optional.req2: Authorization from your taxi central or guild to operate with ETAXI

onboarding.title: Onboarding Process
onboarding.subtitle: 4 simple steps to start working with ETAXI

step1.title: Complete Registration
step1.description: Fill out the form with your personal and vehicle data. Takes only 5 minutes.

step2.title: Document Validation
step2.description: Our team verifies your A1 license, municipal permits and vehicle documentation. Response within 24-48 hours.

step3.title: Training and Setup
step3.description: We teach you how to use the driver app. We set up your profile and add you to your guild or taxi central on the platform.

step4.title: Start Working!
step4.description: Download the app, activate your availability and start receiving trip requests. 24/7 support available.

fullTime.title: Full Time
fullTime.description: Drivers who work full time with ETAXI

earnings.note: * Estimated earnings. Vary by city, schedules and demand. Does not include operational costs (fuel, maintenance, etc.)

testimonial1.name: Roberto Silva
testimonial1.text: After 15 years in this business, ETAXI is the best thing that's happened to regulated taxis. More trips, less idle time, and everything 100% legal.

testimonial2.name: Maria Fernandez
testimonial2.text: The app is super easy to use and technical support always responds quickly. I feel supported and safe working with ETAXI.

testimonial3.name: Carlos Munoz
testimonial3.text: I started 6 months ago with ETAXI and it's already doubled my trips. Passengers value that we're legal and rate us well.

q1.question: How much commission does ETAXI charge?
q1.answer: The commission is coordinated directly with your guild or taxi central. It's transparent and fair, with no surprise changes. Contact us to learn the specific conditions for your area.

q2.question: Do I need a smartphone?
q2.answer: Yes, you need an Android 6.0+ or iOS 13.0+ smartphone to use the driver app. It doesn't require a high-end phone, it works on basic devices.

q3.question: Can I work with ETAXI and other platforms?
q3.answer: Yes, as long as your guild or taxi central authorizes it. ETAXI does not require exclusivity, but you must comply with your obligations as a professional driver.

q4.question: What if I don't have a guild?
q4.answer: ETAXI primarily works with guilds, cooperatives and taxi centrals. If you're not affiliated, we can guide you on options in your municipality.

q5.question: How do I receive trip payments?
q5.answer: The passenger pays the driver directly at the end of the trip (cash or methods you accept). ETAXI does not intermediate payments in this phase of the project.

q6.question: Are there penalties for canceling a trip?
q6.answer: We understand that unexpected situations arise. There are no penalties for occasional cancellations, but frequent cancellations may affect your rating and trip assignments.

hero.title: Set Up Your ETAXI App in Minutes
hero.subtitle: Follow this step-by-step visual guide to properly install and configure the ETAXI driver app on your phone.

descarga.title: Download
descarga.description: Find and install ETAXI from Google Play Store

acceso.title: Login
acceso.description: Sign in with your driver credentials

configuracion.title: Setup
configuracion.description: Configure your work mode and vehicle

permisos.title: Permissions
permisos.description: Grant the necessary permissions for the app to work

01.title: Search ETAXI in Play Store
01.description: Open Google Play Store and search for 'ETAXI'. Select the official ETAXI driver app.

02.title: Welcome Screen
02.description: When you open the app, you'll see the welcome screen. Tap 'Get Started' to begin the setup process.

03.title: Login Form
03.description: The login form will appear. Here you'll enter your driver credentials.

04.title: Enter Credentials
04.description: Enter your username and password provided by ETAXI. Then tap 'Sign In'.

05.title: Select Work Mode
05.description: Choose your preferred work mode: individual or associated with a union/company.

06.title: Select Vehicle
06.description: Select the vehicle you'll be working with. If you have multiple, choose the one for today.

07.title: Enable Biometrics
07.description: You'll be asked if you want to enable biometric login (fingerprint or face) for faster and more secure access.

08.title: Permissions Notice
08.description: The app will inform you about the required permissions for proper operation. It's important to grant them all.

09.title: Camera Permission
09.description: Allow camera access. It's used for taking vehicle photos and trip security recording.

10.title: Microphone Permission
10.description: Allow audio recording. It's used for security recording during trips.

11.title: Notifications Permission
11.description: Allow notifications to receive alerts for new trips and important messages.

12.title: Phone Calls Permission
12.description: Allow phone calls to contact passengers directly when needed.

13.title: Files Permission
13.description: Allow file access to store recordings and necessary documents.

14.title: Location Notice
14.description: The app will explain why it needs access to your location. It's essential for receiving trips.

15.title: Location Options
15.description: Select 'Allow all the time' for the app to work properly even in the background.

16.title: Background Location
16.description: Confirm that the app can access your location in the background to keep receiving trips.

17.title: App Info
17.description: Access the app settings from System Settings to verify permissions.

18.title: Always Allow Location
18.description: In permission settings, make sure location is set to 'Allow always'.

19.title: Verify Permissions
19.description: Check that all permissions are properly configured in the app's permissions section.

20.title: Other Permissions
20.description: Verify and configure additional permissions needed for optimal operation.

21.title: Shortcuts
21.description: Allow the app to create shortcuts for quick access to important features.

22.title: Main Screen - Permissions
22.description: If you see pending permission notices on the main screen, configure them from the indicated button.

23.title: Battery Optimization
23.description: Set the app as 'Unrestricted' in battery optimization to prevent it from closing in the background.

24.title: Mode Access
24.description: Configure mode access for the app to function completely.

25.title: Confirm Mode Access
25.description: Confirm the dialog to allow the app to access the necessary mode configurations.

26.title: Busy Status
26.description: When you're on a trip, the screen will show 'Busy' status with current service details.

27.title: Available Status
27.description: In 'Available' status the app will search for nearby trips. Make sure to be in this view to receive requests.

28.title: Message Inbox
28.description: Access your messages and communications. Here you'll receive important notices from ETAXI.

29.title: Scheduled Services
29.description: View trips that have been assigned to you in advance.

30.title: History and Earnings
30.description: Check your trip history and daily, weekly, or monthly earnings summary.

31.title: Profile Menu
31.description: Access the side menu to view your profile, settings, and additional options.

32.title: Map View
32.description: The map shows your current location and available trips in your coverage area.

33.title: General Preferences
33.description: Configure your work preferences: trip types, preferred zones, and more.

34.title: Referral System
34.description: Invite other drivers to ETAXI and earn benefits for each referral that joins.

35.title: Report Incident
35.description: If you have any problem during a trip, use this form to report it quickly.

36.title: GPS Solutions
36.description: If you're having GPS issues, access this menu for help and solutions.

37.title: Detailed GPS Help
37.description: Complete guide to solve common GPS problems and improve location accuracy.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

q1.question: What do I do if I don't have my credentials?
q1.answer: If you don't have credentials yet, you need to complete the driver registration process with ETAXI. Contact the support team or visit our drivers page for more information.

q2.question: Why does the app need so many permissions?
q2.answer: Each permission has a specific function: location is for assigning nearby trips, camera and microphone for security recording, notifications for alerting you of new trips. All are necessary for proper operation.

q3.question: What do I do if the app doesn't receive trips?
q3.answer: Verify that: 1) You're in 'Available' status, 2) GPS is active with good signal, 3) Location is set to 'Allow always', 4) Battery optimization isn't restricting the app.

faq.moreHelp: Need more help? Visit our Help section

cta.subtitle: Download the app and start receiving trips today
